name: Sales Follow-up Reminder
description: Find leads that haven't been contacted in 3+ days and send the sales rep a daily digest of overdue follow-ups. Prevents leads from going cold.
author: platform

config.sql: SELECT l.id, l.email, l.company, l.owner_email, MAX(a.created_at) AS last_activity FROM leads l LEFT JOIN activities a ON a.lead_id = l.id WHERE l.status = 'open' GROUP BY l.id, l.email, l.company, l.owner_email HAVING MAX(a.created_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days' OR MAX(a.created_at) IS NULL ORDER BY last_activity NULLS FIRST

config.subject: {{nodes.node-2.data.rowCount}} leads need your attention today
config.html:
Overdue Follow-ups

The following leads haven't been contacted in 3+ days:

{{nodes.node-2.data.rows}}
